calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Continued To Oct-06-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Aug-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Brenda Fields
Appearances:
Jennifer Chon, Esq. for Plaintiff First American Title Co., and plaintiff's witness, Brian Momaney also present, were sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Amos M. Myers and Donnell C. Myers.
Principal of $25,541.95
Attorney's fees of $1,857.50
Costs of $400.50
Interest of $1,085.00 For the total of $28,884.95.
Does 1-100 are dismissed.
Counsel to prepare judgment.
